subject: Exclusive Upgrade Offer Just for You, Tom!
body:
Hi Tom,

Thank you for being a valued member of our family for the past 7 years! We appreciate your loyalty and want to enhance your experience with an exclusive upgrade offer.

As a premium subscriber currently enjoying your iPhone 14, we think you’ll love the new Apple Watch S9. This smartwatch is designed to keep you connected while providing advanced health and fitness tracking features, including ECG and blood oxygen monitoring. With its Always-on Retina display and safety features like Crash Detection and Emergency SOS, the Apple Watch S9 is not just a device; it’s a companion that could help keep you safe.

For just £22 a month, you can elevate your lifestyle and stay on top of your health and safety.

Ready to upgrade? Click here to secure your Apple Watch S9 today!

Best regards,
Your Telco Team
